failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
  p.id AS publication_id,
  p.description
FROM publication p
WHERE p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'japanese & restaurant & (sushi | ramen | tempura | sashimi | bento | udon | yakitori)')
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'japanese & restaurant & (sushi | ramen | tempura | sashimi | bento | udon | yakitori)')) DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.
